summary: Gallery management feature testing completed. All Gallery API endpoints working (CRUD). Public gallery page displays images with category filters and lightbox. Admin gallery panel supports adding, editing, and deleting images by category.

issues.description: core-flows.spec.ts has 4 failing tests due to mismatched data-testids between tests and frontend code. Tests expect testids like 'weekly-preview-section', 'nav-link-weekly-menu', 'mobile-nav-link-weekly-menu' but these don't exist in the frontend. The actual navigation uses /menu route, not /weekly-menu.
AdminLogin page doesn't have register toggle functionality visible (no toggle-auth-mode button). Tests were expecting a toggle between login/register forms but the page only shows login form.

action_items: Fix core-flows.spec.ts to use correct testids or add missing testids to frontend components
Consider adding more data-testids to Home.js for better test coverage (e.g., weekly-preview-section)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use default admin credentials and clean up after themselves
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery feature fully tested. Backend API tests in test_gallery.py cover all CRUD operations. Frontend tests in gallery.spec.ts cover public gallery page with filters/lightbox and admin gallery management. Note: core-flows.spec.ts needs fixing for route/testid mismatches but is outside scope of gallery feature.
